name: Amasten Fastighets AB (publ)
summary: Amasten Fastighets AB (publ) builds, develops, and manages real estate properties in Sweden. It also develops and manages housing properties. The company was formerly known as Amasten Holding AB (publ) and changed its name to Amasten Fastighets AB (publ) in November 2017. Amasten Fastighets AB (publ) is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
